title: InputFormat
description: Meta-schema every domain pack's input_formats/<id>/format.json must satisfy.

strict.description: If true, G_format_in fails when no matcher fires; if false, falls back to generic/any-document

match_threshold.description: Combined matcher-score threshold for a positive match

matchers.description: At least one matcher type must be present. Each matcher lives in its own file under matchers/.

required_fields.description: Claim/entity/section paths (dot-notation) whose absence is flagged in AnalysisReport.missing_required_fields

schema.description: Path to schema.json — JSON schema the ExtractionBundle must satisfy for this format

example.description: Path to example/ with one known-good sample
